cake_001.name: Chocolate Birthday Delight
cake_001.description: Rich, moist chocolate cake with dark chocolate ganache - perfect for quick birthday celebrations
cake_001.why_description: Quick to make, moist texture, perfect for birthdays

baking_steps.title: Prepare Your Workspace
baking_steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour two 9-inch round cake pans. Gather all ingredients and equipment.

baking_steps.title: Mix Dry Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: In a large bowl, whisk together 2 cups all-purpose flour, 3/4 cup cocoa powder, 2 cups sugar, 1 tsp baking powder, and 1/2 tsp salt.

baking_steps.title: Combine Wet Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: In another bowl, beat 4 eggs, then add 1 cup melted butter, 1 cup milk, and 2 tsp vanilla extract. Mix until smooth.

baking_steps.title: Mix Batter
baking_steps.instruction: Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined. Do not overmix.

baking_steps.title: Pour and Bake
baking_steps.instruction: Divide batter evenly between prepared pans. Bake for 25-30 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.

baking_steps.title: Cool Cakes
baking_steps.instruction: Allow cakes to cool in pans for 10 minutes, then turn out onto wire racks to cool completely (about 1 hour).

baking_steps.title: Make Ganache
baking_steps.instruction: Heat 1 cup heavy cream until just simmering. Pour over 8 oz chopped dark chocolate. Let sit 2 minutes, then stir until smooth.

baking_steps.title: Assemble and Frost
baking_steps.instruction: Place first cake layer on plate. Spread ganache on top. Add second cake layer. Pour remaining ganache over top and sides.

cake_002.name: Strawberry Bliss
cake_002.description: Fresh strawberry cake with cream cheese frosting - elegant and refreshing
cake_002.why_description: Elegant presentation, fresh fruit flavor, great for special occasions

baking_steps.title: Prepare Equipment
baking_steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease two 8-inch round cake pans and line bottoms with parchment paper.

baking_steps.title: Prepare Strawberries
baking_steps.instruction: Wash 2 cups fresh strawberries and slice them. Set aside 1 cup for decoration and puree 1 cup for the batter.

baking_steps.title: Mix Dry Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Whisk together 2 cups flour, 2 tsp baking powder, 1/2 tsp salt, and 1.5 cups sugar in a large bowl.

baking_steps.title: Combine Wet Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Beat 3 eggs, add 1 cup softened butter, 3/4 cup strawberry puree, 2 tbsp lemon juice, and 2 tsp vanilla. Mix well.

baking_steps.title: Create Batter
baking_steps.instruction: Fold wet ingredients into dry ingredients until just combined. Gently fold in sliced strawberries.

baking_steps.title: Bake Cakes
baking_steps.instruction: Divide batter between pans. Bake for 35-40 minutes until toothpick inserted comes out clean. Cool 10 minutes.

baking_steps.title: Make Cream Cheese Frosting
baking_steps.instruction: Beat 12 oz softened cream cheese with 1/2 cup butter until fluffy. Add 3 cups powdered sugar and 1 tsp vanilla. Beat until smooth.

baking_steps.title: Assemble Cake
baking_steps.instruction: Place first cake layer on plate. Spread frosting on top. Add second layer. Frost top and sides. Decorate with fresh strawberries.

cake_003.name: Vanilla Dream
cake_003.description: Classic vanilla cake with whipped cream - timeless and versatile
cake_003.why_description: Versatile base, quick to make, pairs well with any frosting

baking_steps.title: Preheat and Prepare
baking_steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease two 9-inch round pans and dust with flour.

baking_steps.title: Dry Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Whisk together 2.5 cups flour, 3 tsp baking powder, and 0.5 tsp salt in a bowl.

baking_steps.title: Cream Butter and Sugar
baking_steps.instruction: Beat 1 cup softened butter with 2 cups sugar until light and fluffy (about 3 minutes).

baking_steps.title: Add Eggs
baking_steps.instruction: Add 4 eggs one at a time to butter mixture, beating well after each addition.

baking_steps.title: Add Flavorings
baking_steps.instruction: Beat in 4 tsp vanilla extract and 1/2 cup milk alternately with dry ingredients, starting and ending with dry mix.

baking_steps.title: Pour Batter
baking_steps.instruction: Divide batter evenly between prepared pans. Smooth tops with spatula.

baking_steps.title: Bake
baking_steps.instruction: Bake for 30-35 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean. Cool in pans for 10 minutes.

baking_steps.title: Cool and Frost
baking_steps.instruction: Turn out onto racks and cool completely. Frost with whipped cream frosting or your favorite topping.

cake_004.name: Vegan Chocolate Bliss
cake_004.description: Completely vegan chocolate cake - rich and indulgent without any animal products
cake_004.why_description: Perfect for vegan guests, rich chocolate flavor, completely plant-based

baking_steps.title: Prepare Pans
baking_steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease two 9-inch round pans and line with parchment paper.

baking_steps.title: Mix Dry Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: In a large bowl, whisk 2 cups flour, 3/4 cup cocoa powder, 2 cups sugar, 2 tsp baking powder, 1 tsp baking soda, and 0.5 tsp salt.

baking_steps.title: Prepare Wet Mix
baking_steps.instruction: In another bowl, combine 2 cups almond milk with 2 tbsp apple cider vinegar. Let sit 2 minutes to curdle.

baking_steps.title: Add Oil and Vanilla
baking_steps.instruction: Stir 0.75 cup vegetable oil and 2 tsp vanilla extract into the milk mixture.

baking_steps.title: Combine Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and stir until just combined. Do not overmix.

baking_steps.title: Bake Cakes
baking_steps.instruction: Divide batter evenly between pans. Bake 35-40 minutes until toothpick comes out clean.

baking_steps.title: Cool Cakes
baking_steps.instruction: Cool in pans for 15 minutes, then turn out onto wire racks to cool completely.

baking_steps.title: Frost
baking_steps.instruction: Layer and frost with vegan chocolate frosting (vegan butter, cocoa, and powdered sugar).

cake_005.name: Gluten-Free Carrot Cake
cake_005.description: Moist carrot cake made with gluten-free flour and cream cheese frosting
cake_005.why_description: Nutritious, gluten-free friendly, warm spice flavors

baking_steps.title: Prepare Equipment
baking_steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease two 9-inch round pans and line bottoms with parchment.

baking_steps.title: Prepare Carrots
baking_steps.instruction: Peel and grate 2 cups fresh carrots. Drain 1 can crushed pineapple well (reserve juice).

baking_steps.title: Mix Dry Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Whisk 2 cups gluten-free flour, 2 tsp cinnamon, 1 tsp nutmeg, 2 tsp baking powder, 1 tsp baking soda, and 0.5 tsp salt.

baking_steps.title: Combine Wet Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Beat 4 eggs with 1.5 cups sugar, then mix in 0.75 cup oil, grated carrots, and drained pineapple.

baking_steps.title: Mix Batter
baking_steps.instruction: Fold wet ingredients into dry ingredients until combined. Stir in 1 cup chopped walnuts.

baking_steps.title: Bake
baking_steps.instruction: Pour into pans. Bake 40-45 minutes until toothpick inserted comes out clean.

baking_steps.title: Cool
baking_steps.instruction: Cool in pans for 15 minutes, then turn out onto wire racks to cool completely.

baking_steps.title: Make and Apply Frosting
baking_steps.instruction: Beat 12 oz cream cheese with 0.5 cup butter, 3 cups powdered sugar, and 1 tsp vanilla. Frost cooled cake.

cake_006.name: Lemon Zest Sunshine
cake_006.description: Bright and tangy lemon cake with lemon buttercream - light and refreshing
cake_006.why_description: Quick to make, bright flavor, perfect for spring/summer events

baking_steps.title: Prepare Pans
baking_steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease two 8-inch round pans and dust with flour.

baking_steps.title: Prepare Lemon
baking_steps.instruction: Zest 3 lemons to get 3 tbsp zest. Juice lemons to get 1 cup fresh lemon juice.

baking_steps.title: Mix Dry Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Whisk 2 cups flour, 3 tsp baking powder, and 0.5 tsp salt in a bowl.

baking_steps.title: Cream Butter and Sugar
baking_steps.instruction: Beat 0.75 cup softened butter with 1.5 cups sugar and 3 tbsp lemon zest until fluffy.

baking_steps.title: Add Eggs and Flavorings
baking_steps.instruction: Add 3 eggs one at a time. Alternate adding dry ingredients with 0.75 cup milk mixed with 1/3 cup lemon juice.

baking_steps.title: Pour Batter
baking_steps.instruction: Divide batter between prepared pans. Bake 25-30 minutes until toothpick comes out clean.

baking_steps.title: Cool
baking_steps.instruction: Cool in pans 10 minutes. Turn out onto wire racks to cool completely.

baking_steps.title: Frost with Lemon Buttercream
baking_steps.instruction: Beat 0.5 cup butter with 2 cups powdered sugar, 2 tbsp lemon juice, and 1 tbsp lemon zest. Frost layers and top.

cake_007.name: Red Velvet Romance
cake_007.description: Elegant red velvet cake with cream cheese frosting - perfect for romantic occasions
cake_007.why_description: Elegant presentation, romantic color, perfect for special occasions

baking_steps.title: Prepare Pans
baking_steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease three 9-inch round pans and line with parchment.

baking_steps.title: Mix Dry Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Whisk 3 cups flour, 1 tbsp cocoa powder, 0.5 tsp baking soda, and 0.5 tsp salt in a bowl.

baking_steps.title: Cream Butter and Sugar
baking_steps.instruction: Beat 1 cup softened butter with 2 cups sugar until light and fluffy (3 minutes).

baking_steps.title: Add Eggs and Coloring
baking_steps.instruction: Add 2 eggs one at a time. Mix in 2 tbsp red food coloring and 2 tsp vanilla extract.

baking_steps.title: Alternate Wet and Dry
baking_steps.instruction: Alternate adding dry ingredients with 1 cup buttermilk, starting and ending with dry ingredients.

baking_steps.title: Bake Layers
baking_steps.instruction: Divide evenly among pans. Bake 25-30 minutes until toothpick comes out clean.

baking_steps.title: Cool Cakes
baking_steps.instruction: Cool in pans 15 minutes, then turn out onto wire racks to cool completely.

baking_steps.title: Make Cream Cheese Frosting
baking_steps.instruction: Beat 1 lb cream cheese with 1 cup butter until smooth. Add 4 cups powdered sugar and 2 tsp vanilla. Beat until fluffy.

baking_steps.title: Assemble and Decorate
baking_steps.instruction: Layer three cakes with frosting between each. Frost entire cake. Chill 2 hours before serving.

cake_008.name: 5-Minute Mug Cake
cake_008.description: Ultra-quick chocolate cake baked in a mug - ready in minutes
cake_008.why_description: Fastest option available, minimal ingredients, perfect for sudden cravings

baking_steps.title: Gather Mug and Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Get a microwave-safe mug (8-12 oz). Gather: 1/4 cup flour, 1/4 cup sugar, 2 tbsp cocoa powder, 1 egg, 3 tbsp milk, 2 tbsp oil, 1/4 tsp baking powder.

baking_steps.title: Mix Dry Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: In the mug, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, and baking powder. Stir well to break up any lumps.

baking_steps.title: Add Wet Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Add egg, milk, and oil to the mug. Stir until smooth and well combined. No lumps!

baking_steps.title: Microwave
baking_steps.instruction: Microwave on high for 60-90 seconds (1-1.5 minutes). Mug will be hot - use caution!

baking_steps.title: Cool Slightly
baking_steps.instruction: Let mug cool for 1-2 minutes before eating. You can add whipped cream, ice cream, or sprinkles on top!

cake_009.name: Luxury Tiered Wedding Cake
cake_009.description: Multi-tiered white chocolate and raspberry wedding cake - show-stopping centerpiece
cake_009.why_description: Grand presentation, perfect for weddings, requires advanced baking skills

baking_steps.title: Prepare Pans
baking_steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Grease 6-inch, 9-inch, and 12-inch round pans. Line bottoms with parchment paper.

baking_steps.title: Make White Chocolate Cake Batter
baking_steps.instruction: Melt 12 oz premium white chocolate. Cream 2 cups butter with 3 cups sugar. Add 8 eggs, then 4 cups flour, alternating with white chocolate. Make 3 batches for different sizes.

baking_steps.title: Bake Base Layer
baking_steps.instruction: Bake 12-inch pan for 45 minutes. Let cool in pan for 20 minutes, then turn out onto rack.

baking_steps.title: Bake Middle Layer
baking_steps.instruction: Bake 9-inch pan for 35 minutes. Cool similarly in pan then on rack.

baking_steps.title: Bake Top Layer
baking_steps.instruction: Bake 6-inch pan for 25 minutes. Cool in pan then on rack.

baking_steps.title: Level and Fill Layers
baking_steps.instruction: Level each cake with a serrated knife. Layer white chocolate frosting between cake sections. Refrigerate 30 minutes.

baking_steps.title: Apply Fondant
baking_steps.instruction: Roll out fondant for each tier. Cover each cake layer. Smooth out air bubbles. Refrigerate 2 hours.

baking_steps.title: Stack Tiers
baking_steps.instruction: Use cake dowels to support upper tiers. Stack carefully from bottom: 12-inch, 9-inch, then 6-inch.

baking_steps.title: Decorate
baking_steps.instruction: Arrange fresh raspberries between tiers. Add edible flowers and gold leaf accents. Keep refrigerated until serving.

cake_010.name: Dairy-Free Coconut Paradise
cake_010.description: Tropical coconut cake with dairy-free frosting - perfect for lactose-intolerant guests
cake_010.why_description: Tropical flavor, dairy-free friendly, creamy texture without dairy

baking_steps.title: Prepare Pans
baking_steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease two 9-inch round pans and line with parchment paper.

baking_steps.title: Mix Dry Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Whisk 2.5 cups flour, 2 cups shredded coconut, 2 tsp baking powder, and 0.5 tsp salt in a large bowl.

baking_steps.title: Combine Wet Ingredients
baking_steps.instruction: Beat 4 eggs with 1.75 cups sugar until light. Add 0.75 cup melted coconut oil and 1 tsp vanilla extract.

baking_steps.title: Combine Milk Mixture
baking_steps.instruction: In a small bowl, combine 1 cup coconut milk with 0.25 cup water (it will be thick, so this thins it).

baking_steps.title: Make Batter
baking_steps.instruction: Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients. Alternate with coconut milk mixture, starting and ending with dry ingredients. Fold in 1 cup toasted coconut.

baking_steps.title: Bake
baking_steps.instruction: Divide batter between pans. Bake 35-40 minutes until toothpick inserted comes out clean.

baking_steps.title: Cool
baking_steps.instruction: Cool in pans 15 minutes. Turn out onto wire racks and cool completely.

baking_steps.title: Make Dairy-Free Frosting
baking_steps.instruction: Beat 0.5 cup coconut oil with 2 cups powdered sugar, 0.25 cup coconut milk, and 1 tsp vanilla until fluffy. Frost cake and top with toasted coconut.
